allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; foreach \($f in @\('ownershipTransfer.png','fractionalOwnership.png','DOAGovernanace.png','yeildBearingAssets.png'\)\) { $bmp = [System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\("c:\\Users\\Amogh\\Desktop\\RWA-website\\src\\assets\\$f"\); $c1 = $bmp.GetPixel\(5,5\); $c2 = $bmp.GetPixel\($bmp.Width-5, $bmp.Height-5\); $c3 = $bmp.GetPixel\($bmp.Width-5, 5\); Write-Output \("{0}: TL=#{1:X2}{2:X2}{3:X2} BR=#{4:X2}{5:X2}{6:X2} TR=#{7:X2}{8:X2}{9:X2}" -f $f, $c1.R,$c1.G,$c1.B, $c2.R,$c2.G,$c2.B, $c3.R,$c3.G,$c3.B\); $bmp.Dispose\(\) })
